questions.question: COBYLA builds approximations using:
questions.explanation: COBYLA = Constrained Optimization BY Linear Approximation.

questions.question: SPSA requires how many function evaluations per step?
questions.explanation: SPSA uses 2 evaluations regardless of dimension.

questions.question: Nelder-Mead uses gradient information.
questions.explanation: Nelder-Mead is a simplex method that only uses function values.

questions.question: Which method is best for very noisy function evaluations?
questions.explanation: COBYLA handles noise better than gradient-based methods.
